title: New Home Joinery Fitout — Epping
summary: New-home joinery fitout in Epping with a warm timber-look kitchen, pantry, study nook and supporting built-ins across the open-plan living zone.
heroAlt: Epping open-plan joinery fitout with kitchen, living area and timber screening
overview: This Epping fitout was planned as a whole-of-home joinery package rather than a single standout room. The kitchen, living storage, pantry and study nook all needed to feel connected so the new-build shell landed with warmth and character from day one.
materials: Primary finishes: Laminex Sublime Teak and Absolute Oak
Open-plan joinery designed to suit the architecture rather than compete with it
Pantry shelving and study joinery built to sit comfortably within the wider living zone
Vanity and secondary joinery details finished to match the rest of the home
Soft, warm timber tones used to make the new build feel more layered and lived in

afterImages.alt: Epping open-plan kitchen with island and timber joinery
afterImages.caption: The main kitchen anchors the open-plan space with a warm timber finish and clean integrated detailing.

afterImages.alt: Epping study nook with floating desk and shelving
afterImages.caption: A compact study nook was built into the home without feeling like an afterthought.

afterImages.alt: Epping pantry shelving and storage detail
afterImages.caption: Pantry storage was planned as part of the architecture so it felt accessible, ordered and visually calm.

afterImages.alt: Epping secondary joinery zone and kitchenette detail
afterImages.caption: Secondary joinery details supported the main living areas and kept the material palette consistent.

afterImages.alt: Epping vanity and living divider joinery detail
afterImages.caption: Joinery and screening helped define zones in the home without breaking the open-plan feel.

afterImages.alt: Epping bathroom vanity and storage joinery
afterImages.caption: The vanity detail continued the timber palette into the bathroom for a more resolved full-home finish.

beforeImages.alt: Epping kitchen during early installation stage
beforeImages.caption: The early build stage shows how the joinery fitout started from a bare new-build shell.
Cabinetry installation and layout planning happened together to keep the joinery aligned with the architecture.

beforeImages.alt: Epping cabinetry before final fronts and finishes
beforeImages.caption: Before the finished fronts and details went on, the project already showed how the joinery would shape the home.

spaces.title: Open-plan kitchen & living
spaces.text: The kitchen and adjoining living joinery were treated as one composition, helping the home feel warm, architectural and easy to live in from the first day.
spaces.alt: Epping kitchen and living zone with timber joinery

spaces.title: Study nook
spaces.text: The study nook adds a real work zone without carving out a full room. It is small-scale joinery that makes everyday life easier.
spaces.alt: Epping study nook with joinery shelving and desk

spaces.title: Pantry & storage
spaces.text: The pantry and supporting storage joinery were built to feel seamless with the kitchen, rather than like standalone add-ons.

spaces.title: Vanity & secondary details
spaces.text: Matching joinery details in the bathroom and other secondary areas kept the fitout feeling complete and intentional across the home.

outcome: The completed spaces feel more architectural and settled because the joinery gives the home a clear material direction and stronger built-in function from the start.
ctaText: Building or fitting out a new home in Sydney? We can help shape the kitchen, storage and supporting joinery so the whole home feels resolved from day one.
